[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 147/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO THE MILITARY EXERCISES (USE OF WEAPON) ALL SHIPS ARE REQUESTED TO AVOID AREA BOUNDED BY POSITIONS:
1. 54-03.73N 014-27.88E
2. 54-11.45N 014-36.38E
3. 54-13.51N 014-46.88E
4. 54-10.31N 014-48.78E
ON 2026-07-16 FROM 12:00 TO 14:00,
ON 2026-07-17 FROM 07:00 TO 09:00.
TIME IN UTC.
EXTREME CAUTION ADVISED.
CANCEL THIS MSG 170900 UTC JUL
